raw_text: You have received GHS 800.00 from RACHEL APPIAH 0241002233. Ref: TXN882910. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 0.00. Your new balance is GHS 1,520.00. 23/03/2026 12:40.
label: suspicious
notes: Contains 'Ref:' field — real MTN uses 'Transaction ID:' not 'Ref:'. E-levy = 0 on GHS 800 transfer (should be ~8.00). Two subtle inconsistencies.

raw_text: E-levy: GHS 2.50. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. You have received GHS 250.00 from PATRICK BOADU 0551234568. Transaction ID: 3847201956. Your new balance is GHS 600.00. 23/03/2026 08:15.
label: suspicious
notes: E-levy and Fee lines appear before the message body. MTN always prints Fee then E-levy after the balance line. Reversed field order suggests manual composition.

raw_text: You have recieved GHS 400.00 from Lydia Mensah 0201556677. Transaction ID: 28391047562. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 4.00. Your new balance is GHS 1,100.00. 23/03/2026 14:40.
label: suspicious
notes: Misspelling 'recieved'. Sender name in Title Case (MTN renders ALL CAPS). E-levy = 1% correct. Two soft anomalies that together raise doubt.

raw_text: Cash receive of GHS 180.00 from DANIEL ASARE 0241008877. Transaction ID: 5573829104. Your balance is GHS 730.00. 24/03/2026 15:10.
label: suspicious
notes: Opener says 'Cash receive' — MTN says 'Cash In of'. Single anomaly but in the most fingerprint-sensitive field (opener phrase).

raw_text: Dear Customer you have received GHS 5,000.00 into your MoMo wallet. Transaction was sent in error. Kindly return GHS 4,500.00 to 0241000111 before it is reversed. Failure to comply will result in reversal and your account being blocked.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: Return-money scam. 'Dear Customer' greeting (MTN never uses). 'sent in error' + 'failure to comply' + 'account being blocked' = stacked urgency. No txn ID balance or sender.

raw_text: MTN MoMo: Your account has been b'locked due to unusual transaction activity. Call our verification line at 0551234567 immediately to avoid permanent suspension. Provide your MoMo PIN and date of birth to verify.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: Account-block scam. 'b'locked' homoglyph evasion to bypass keyword filters. Requests PIN + date of birth. 'MTN MoMo:' colon prefix is a known scam pattern. No transaction details.

raw_text: You have received GHS 2,500.00 from JOHN MENSAH. Your MoMo PIN is required to release your funds. This transaction will expire within 24 hours if not confirmed. Dial *170# now.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: PIN harvesting. Opens like a real notification then requests PIN. 'expire within 24 hours' urgency. No txn ID or balance. Sender name present to add false credibility.

raw_text: You have received GHS 3,000.00 from MERCHANT SERVICES. Do not attempt your PIN. This amount has been credited to your acount by the MTN Foundation. Contact 0209876543 for verification before using funds.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: 'credited' is bank language not MTN. Misspelling 'acount'. 'Do not attempt your PIN' is a known scam threat. 'MTN Foundation' and 'MERCHANT SERVICES' are fake entities. No txn ID or balance.

raw_text: Congrats! You have won GHS 10,000.00 in the MTN Mobile Money: Anniversary Draw! To claim send GHS 200.00 activation fee to agent 0241112233. Offer expires today. Your secret code: 5839. Do not share.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: Advance-fee prize scam. 'MTN Mobile Money:' colon prefix. Requests GHS 200 'activation fee'. 'secret code' mimics OTP. 'expires today' urgency. No txn ID or balance.
